questionHtml: Compare and contrast the use of genetically modified corn in the USA in the years 2000 and 2015.
markschemeHtml:
a. large increase in (percentage of area planted with) genetically modified corn 

b. Bt and HT together hardly/not planted in the year 2000 but is majority of corn planted in 2015 

c. HT alone has slightly increased while Bt alone has decreased 

d. all 3 types of corn were planted in both 2000 and 2015

meta.title: Compare and contrast the use of genetically modified corn in the USA in the years 2000 and 2015.
breadcrumbLabels: Option B: Biotechnology and bioinformatics (Core topics)
